name: vllm-copilot
description: Use your own vLLM-hosted AI models directly in GitHub Copilot — full tool calling, thinking modes, and vision support and all vLLM special features.
author: Dieter Schwarzmann <info@systemwissenschaften.de>

vllm-copilot.models.markdownDescription: Per-model configuration — server, auth, params, modes. See README Configuration Reference for details.

serverUrl.markdownDescription: **Required.** The vLLM server URL hosting this model (OpenAI-compatible API). Each model targets its own server; there is no global server.

requestHeaders.markdownDescription: HTTP headers sent with every request to this model's server (auth, routing, etc.). **Isolated:** used only for this model's server and never shared with other servers. Put a bearer token as `{ "Authorization": "Bearer <key>" }` or a gateway key as `{ "X-API-Key": "..." }`.

id.markdownDescription: **Unique preset ID** used by VS Code to identify this model preset. Must be unique across all entries. If `vllmModelId` is not set, this value is also used as the vLLM server model identifier.

vllmModelId.markdownDescription: The **actual model ID on the vLLM server** (e.g. `Qwen/Qwen3-8B`). Allows multiple presets with different `id` values to point to the same server model. If omitted, `id` is used as the vLLM model identifier.

displayName.markdownDescription: Human-readable name shown in the VS Code model picker. If omitted, the model id is used (e.g. `"Qwen/Qwen3.6-27B on localhost:8000"").

family.markdownDescription: Model family identifier (e.g. `qwen3_5`, `deepseek_v4`, `llama`). Auto-detected from HuggingFace `config.model_type` or extracted from the model ID. Shown by VS Code in the model picker for display purposes.

maxOutputTokens.markdownDescription: Maximum tokens the model may generate in a single response. **Default: 4096.** The server will enforce its own hard limit; this value only affects the extension's token budget calculation.

maxInputTokens.markdownDescription: **Computed automatically** from the vLLM server's `max_model_len` minus `maxOutputTokens`. You can set a lower value here to reserve extra headroom, but it is clamped so input + output never exceeds the total context window. Most users should leave this unset.

estimateCharsPerToken.markdownDescription: Average characters per token for local token estimation. **Default: 3.5.** Depends on the model's tokenizer — English models are ~3.5, tokenizers with many subword tokens may be higher.

defaultParams.markdownDescription:
**Model-scope request params** (raw vLLM request-body keys, snake_case). Merged on top of built-in defaults (`temperature: 0.7`, `top_p: 1.0`) and overridden by the selected `modelModes` entry.

Example: `{ "temperature": 1, "top_p": 0.95, "presence_penalty": 0, "repetition_detection": { "max_pattern_size": 4, "min_count": 3 } }`

additionalProperties.description: Parameters to merge into the vLLM request body when this mode is selected.

defaultMode.markdownDescription: Explicit default mode for the model picker dropdown. The value must match one of the keys in `modelModes`. If omitted or invalid, the first mode in `modelModes` is used as the default.

capabilities.markdownDescription: ⚡ **Experimental** — Model capabilities not discoverable from vLLM. Set these manually.

toolCalling.description: Whether the model supports tool/function calling (default: true).

imageInput.markdownDescription: ⚡ **Experimental** — vLLM does not expose this. Set to `true` if your model supports vision/image input.

streamInactivityTimeout.markdownDescription: Inactivity timeout in ms for this model's SSE stream. If the server sends no tokens for this duration, the stream is considered stalled and the request ends. **Default: 0** (disabled — wait indefinitely).

autoContinueRetries.markdownDescription: How many times to automatically retry when the model returns an empty or truncated response. Uses an **assistant prefill** to nudge the model: for empty responses it restarts the turn; for truncated responses (ending with `:`) it continues the partial output. **Default: 1.** Set to 0 to disable.

systemMessageReplacementsFile.markdownDescription: ⚡ **Advanced** — Path to a JSON file with find/replace rules for system messages. Each rule: `{ "ruleName": "...", "find": "exact substring", "replace": "replacement text" }`. Applied to every system message before sending to vLLM. Recommended: `.vllm/prompt-replacements.json`

vllm-copilot.systemMessageCapture.markdownDescription: **Advanced.** Capture all Copilot system messages to `.vllm/system-messages.json`. Enables discovering which prompt types your model receives. Write once per unique message (deduped).

vllm-copilot.enableFileLogging.markdownDescription: Enable file-based logging of all requests and responses. Logs are written to a daily file in the extension's storage directory. Use **Open Log File** to view.

vllm-copilot.logBodyLimit.markdownDescription: Maximum characters of request/response bodies to log per entry. Set to `0` for no truncation (full bodies). Only applies when file logging is enabled.

vllm-copilot.dashboard.enabled.markdownDescription: Enable the vLLM Dashboard sidebar. When disabled, polling stops.

vllm-copilot.dashboard.pollIntervalMs.markdownDescription: Polling interval in milliseconds for server metrics. **Default: 15000** (15 seconds).

scripts.build: npm run compile && npm test && npx @vscode/vsce package --allow-missing-repository --baseContentUrl "https://example.com"
